metadata.name: CLUTRR kinship gold graphs
metadata.description: CLUTRR (Sinha et al., EMNLP 2019) semi-synthetic family stories standardized to per-story gold KINSHIP graphs: entity nodes (surface, gender, mention spans) + typed atomic story facts (the proof chain...[truncated]
metadata.schema: exp_sel_data_out (input=story string, output=json.dumps(gold_graph), structured per-row data under metadata_* keys).

clutrr_gen.doc: Clean stories. Train hops 2-3-4, test hops 2..10 -> the multi-hop accuracy-vs-chain-length curve + atomic-extraction P/R + trace-graph.

clutrr_disc.doc: Disconnected-fact noise: a second, structurally separate family chain => genuine within-document ABSENT-relation pairs for the hallucination demo.

composition_table.semantics: Triple (h, r, t) reads 't is h's r'. Composition: A t1 B, B t2 C => A t3 C, where rules[t1][t2]=t3 and the surface form of t3 uses the gender of C.
composition_table.note: Finite composition table over kinship relation TYPES (facebookresearch/clutrr rules_store.yaml). NOT a full relation algebra: no general intersection/converse closure beyond these rules; some composit...[truncated]

source.scope: family relation type only (CLUTRR 'work' relation type excluded; the delivered configs are all kinship).

gold_graph_field_spec.edges: typed ATOMIC story facts (the proof chain); {source,target,kinship_relation,relation_type,is_query=false,hop_count=1}; directed: t is source's kinship_relation (i.e. (h,r,t) with h=source).
gold_graph_field_spec.noise_edges: extra story_edges CLUTRR does NOT type (disconnected/distractor facts); structural only {source,target,relation_type=null}. The word-before-bracket heuristic recovers only ~54% even on known edges, so...[truncated]
gold_graph_field_spec.query_edge: held-out, NOT stated; deduced by composing the atomic edges; {source,target,kinship_relation=gold,relation_type,target_int,hop_count}.
gold_graph_field_spec.absent_relation_pairs: entity pairs in DIFFERENT connected components of the story graph => provably no kinship path => 'no-relation' (structural, conservative, sound). Capped at 20/story.

reconstruction_facts.node_id_to_name: genders is canonically ordered by node id; verified consistent with the backward-chaining proof leaves on all rows.
reconstruction_facts.atomic_edges: = story_edges[:len(edge_types)] zipped with edge_types (the proof chain is always the prefix; verified 0 violations).
reconstruction_facts.leaves: proof_state sub-triples that are never a goal key (= the atomic facts).
reconstruction_facts.directionality: story_edge (s,t) with edge_types[k]=r encodes leaf (name[s], r, name[t]) = 'name[t] is name[s]'s r'.

provenance.dataset: CLUTRR: A Diagnostic Benchmark for Inductive Reasoning from Text
provenance.csv_source: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kliang5/CLUTRR_huggingface_dataset/main (the GitHub raw mirror HF CLUTRR/v1 v1.py downloads)
provenance.license: CLUTRR is released by Facebook under a research/non-commercial license (see facebookresearch/clutrr LICENSE; CC-BY-NC-style). Use for research only.

metadata.boundary_note: DESCRIPTIVE counts only. No composition/closure, all-pair labeling, atomic-extraction P/R, multi-hop accuracy, N*, or hallucination-rate numbers, and no LLM calls -- those are iter-3's experiment.
